record.field: AI Payment Validator: Invoice Paid Notification

Hello {{ object.matched_invoice_id.invoice_user_id.name or 'Team' }},

Great news — invoice {{ object.matched_invoice_id.name }} for client {{ object.matched_invoice_id.partner_id.name }} has been paid and validated.

Invoice {{ object.matched_invoice_id.name }}
Amount {{ object.matched_invoice_id.currency_id.symbol }} {{ '{:,.2f}'.format(object.matched_invoice_id.amount_total) }}
Client {{ object.matched_invoice_id.partner_id.name }}
Proof Ref {{ object.name }}
Validated by {{ object.write_uid.name }}

— AI Payment Validator | Manzi Osee
